name: YOUR IMAGINATION COMES TRUE
description:
No rules, just pure imagination. Make your own scenario and let the bot embrace it!

**DISCLAIMER :**
* Your role is simply to provide the scenario, the bot will do the roleplay.
* You can list the characters you want to be in the scenario and do the roleplay as {{user}}. The characters count is unlimited, and the bot will do roleplay for all characters beside {{user}}.
* You can decide the personality for each character, you can even decide what one character should say, just drop it in the chat and leave it to the bot.
* You can choose the place for each scenario, or the story for each characters, the detailer the better of course. Just drop anything related to the scenario that you want the bot to know, it will help the bot to do the roleplay more precisely.
* If you want the scenario to be related, then use "Continue the scenario" in your scenario. If you want it unrelated to the previous, please use "Make new scenario" or just simply start a new chat.
creator: gomiayo
